history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands on a rooftop, silhouetted against a dramatic sunset. They are wearing a white t-shirt with the text "THREE SECOND" printed on it, black shorts, and a dark blue baseball cap with "K-SWISS" in white lettering. The person is holding and playing an acoustic guitar, with their right hand strumming the strings and their left hand on the fretboard. The background features a sprawling residential area with terracotta tiled roofs, interspersed with trees and utility poles. Above, the sky is filled with a breathtaking sunset, with golden rays of sunlight piercing through fluffy, dramatic clouds. The overall mood is serene and contemplative, with a touch of artistic flair. The lighting is warm and diffused, casting a soft glow over the scene. The color palette is dominated by warm oranges, yellows, and soft blues of the sky, contrasting with the earthy tones of the rooftops and the darker silhouette of the person and guitar. The style is realistic with a hint of atmospheric photography.
